comment.body:
dunno, downside hedges are bid in to next week too. but pricing vol crush next week friday expo.
sooo, it is a risky game. if ER doesn't hit expectations, or somehting happens, like Jobs coming out or anything, puts will catch up.
So if I'd play it, I would hedge my position into ER, and would use tight stop-loss
